title: oxydectes noronhae
intro: Oxydectes noronhae, commonly known as the "Gentle Woodrose", is a plant species that belongs to the family Gentianaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly for its therapeutic properties that help alleviate various health issues. The health benefits of Oxydectes noronhae include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce stress, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. The bioactive constituents present in this plant include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its therapeutic actions, such as sedative, anti-anxiety, and anti-depressant effects.

side_effects: Oxydectes noronhae can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal problems, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, due to its high concentration of toxic compounds.
